name: Thanksgiving Dressing
recipeIngredient: veggie broth or broth made from chicken flavored veggie broth mix
1 equivalent of non-fat egg substitute (or omit if vegan)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the vegetables in white wine until tender but not limp and mushy.
2. Add herbs to the sautéing vegetables.
3. Mix the cooked vegetables with bread cubes.
4. Add egg and enough broth to make it all quite moist but not soupy.
5. Transfer mixture to a greased baking dish and cover.
6. Bake for 30 minutes, then uncover and bake an additional 15 minutes.
7. Serve with mushroom gravy.
Note: For vegans, omit the egg or use a non-fat egg substitute. Adjust seasoning as needed.
